## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Related Issues

Fixes #(issue number)

## Testing

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Ruff passes (`uv run ruff check src/`)
- [ ] MyPy passes (`uv run mypy src/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style
- [ ] Tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
